required_preferences.fact: Replaces hiking outings with neighborhood walks or park strolls, avoiding uneven trails and new routes until her wrist has fully healed

supersedes.fact: Explores a new hiking trail at least once a month and never repeats the same route within four weeks

required_preferences.fact: Suspends public training workshops entirely, replacing interactive demos with crisis bulletins and security advisory emails for staff until the incident is resolved

supersedes.fact: Hosts training workshops with interactive demos only; never uses slides-only presentations

required_preferences.fact: Prepares all weeknight dinners at home with her son, involving him in meal planning and cooking to support consistent family routines and bonding during his high school adjustment
Plans occasional weekend visits to Portland to maintain close relationships with her sister and nephew despite the move, but no longer offers routine childcare or weekly support

Prefers monitoring server logs and alerts in 15-minute increments throughout the day instead of doing extended backend review sessions—finds short, frequent checks more manageable with mixed support duties
Stops work-related communication and ticket follow-ups at 8pm sharp — does not check email or respond to tech support requests in the late evening while under sleep study protocols

persona: A mid-career helpdesk technician working in a university IT department
